input.background: Exercise 18.3 found that 43% of CMV+ patients experienced arterial restenosis within 6 months of atherectomy. In contrast, 8% of CMV-patients experienced a similar outcome. Table 18.8 contains observed counts.
input.data:
Table 18.8 Data for Exercise 18.3 and 18.9. Restenosis within 6 months of angioplasty by CMV serological status.

\begin{tabular}{lc|c|}
\hline & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Restenosed } & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Did not restenose } & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Total }\
\hline
\hline CMV + & 21 & 28 & 49 \
\hline CMV- & 2 & 24 & 26 \
\hline Total & 23 & 49 & 75 \
\hline
\end{tabular}
input.question: Repeat the test with a $z$-statistic ($\$ 17.3). Show the relation between the chi-square statistic and the $z$-statistic.

output.answer:
$z_{\text {stat }}=3.14, P=0.0017$. Note that $z^2_{\text {stat }}=3.14^2=9.86 \approx X^2$ stat

With continuity-correction, $z^2$ stat., $c=2.88^2=8.30 \approx X^2$ stat, c

CMV_status.description: CMV serological status of the patients, indicating whether they are CMV positive or negative.

restenosis_status.description: The restenosis outcome within 6 months of angioplasty, indicating whether the artery restenosed or did not restenose.

count_CMV_positive_restenosed.description: Number of CMV+ patients who experienced restenosis within 6 months.

count_CMV_positive_not_restenosed.description: Number of CMV+ patients who did not experience restenosis within 6 months.

count_CMV_negative_restenosed.description: Number of CMV- patients who experienced restenosis within 6 months.

count_CMV_negative_not_restenosed.description: Number of CMV- patients who did not experience restenosis within 6 months.

total_CMV_positive.description: Total number of CMV+ patients in the study.

total_CMV_negative.description: Total number of CMV- patients in the study.

total_restenosed.description: Total number of patients who experienced restenosis within 6 months.

total_not_restenosed.description: Total number of patients who did not experience restenosis within 6 months.

total_patients.description: Total number of patients in the study.
